name: landroid-ai-proxy
description: Lambda that verifies a Cognito ID token and proxies OpenAI chat completions.

scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../lambda.zip . && cd .. && zip -g lambda.zip -j node_modules/aws-jwt-verify/dist/cjs/*.js 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.bundle: rm -rf dist lambda.zip && npm run build && cp package.json dist/ && cp -r node_modules dist/ && cd dist && zip -qr ../lambda.zip . && cd .. && ls -lh lambda.zip
